app.script:
df <- get.input()
df$time_sq_s2 <- df$time_s^2
fit <- lm(distance_m ~ 0 + time_sq_s2, data = df)
plot(df$time_sq_s2, df$distance_m,
  pch = 19, col = "steelblue", cex = 1.6,
  xlab = "time^2_s2", ylab = "distance_m",
  main = "Free Fall"
)
arrows(df$time_sq_s2, df$distance_m - df$distance_err_m,
  df$time_sq_s2, df$distance_m + df$distance_err_m,
  angle = 90, code = 3, length = 0.05
)
abline(a = 0, b = coef(fit)[1], col = "navy", lwd = 2)
cat(sprintf("Estimated g: %.2f m/s^2\n", 2 * coef(fit)[1]))

runtimeStatus.text: サンプルを読み込みました
